channel.title: The Daily Briefing
channel.description: Your personalised daily briefing - weather, calendar, markets, commodities, and world news. Generated fresh every morning.
channel.itunes:author: Daily Briefing Bot
channel.itunes:summary: AI-generated daily briefing covering Gold Coast weather, calendar, global markets, commodities, and world news.

item.title: Daily Briefing - Sunday, April 12, 2026
item.description: Your daily briefing for Sunday, April 12, 2026.
